title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at SEBI - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at SEBI are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SEBI:
SEBI is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SEBI!
